use_cases: 3D sphere visualization with animated dots creating depth illusion on canvas
Decorative hero element with ambient dot sphere animation
Background ambient animation for landing pages and splash screens
Interactive sphere component with optional mouse-follow behavior
ai_summary: A canvas-based 3D dot sphere animation that renders hundreds of dots in spherical formation with smooth easing-based rotation. The component creates a mesmerizing depth illusion using flat-colored dots positioned mathematically in 3D space, projected onto 2D canvas. Configurable via props for dot spacing, sphere radius, colors, and optional mouse-follow behavior. Self-contained with no external dependencies.
